steps.title: Compare the two approaches
steps.content:
Text 1 reports Nicholson's findings in a neutral, observational way — listing the crater's features ("elevated rim, circular shape, terraced floor, central uplift") without rhetorical embellishment.

Text 2 takes a more engaged tone, considering and dismissing alternative explanations to argue for the impact-crater interpretation.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice A captures this contrast in approach: Text 1's straightforward description versus Text 2's more evaluative engagement with the question of how Nadir formed.

The other choices misstate what each text covers (B reverses the focus on absent vs. shared features; C and D misdescribe the structure of each text's argument).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
